narrative:
Cuy Falls 8-A (precinct in Summit County) has 974 registered voters, with 48.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.1%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.3 percentage points.
